name: Alibarbar Ice Adjust
description: The Alibarbar Ice Adjust features an adjustable ice-level dial, letting you tailor the cooling intensity. 12,000 puffs of customisable freshness.

flavours.name: Lemon Lime
flavours.description: The Alibarbar Ice Adjust Lemon Lime is a zesty citrus explosion, combining sharp lemon and tangy lime with a crisp menthol finish. Refreshing, fizzy, and bright, it’s the ultimate thirst-quenching vape.

flavours.name: Watermelon
flavours.description: The Alibarbar Ice Adjust Watermelon delivers the juicy sweetness of fresh watermelon, perfectly paired with an icy menthol breeze. Smooth, light, and refreshing, it’s a classic fruity flavour with a cool twist.

flavours.name: Strawberry Kiwi
flavours.description: The Alibarbar Ice Adjust Strawberry Kiwi blends the juicy sweetness of ripe strawberries with the tart kick of kiwi. Rounded off by a cool finish, it’s a fruity, refreshing combination that’s crisp and balanced.

flavours.name: Pineapple Coconut
flavours.description: The Alibarbar Ice Adjust Pineapple Coconut captures the taste of a tropical holiday, mixing juicy pineapple with creamy coconut and a cooling menthol exhale. Smooth, exotic, and refreshing, it’s sunshine in a vape.

flavours.name: Skittles
flavours.description: The Alibarbar Ice Adjust Skittles bursts with the sweet, tangy medley of rainbow candy, finished with a frosty chill. Fruity, playful, and refreshing, it’s perfect for those who crave a sugary treat with an icy twist.

flavours.name: Lady Killer
flavours.description: The Alibarbar Ice Adjust Lady Killer is a smooth, fruity cocktail of berries and tropical notes with a refined icy undertone. Elegant, balanced, and refreshing, it’s designed for vapers who enjoy a premium fruit blend with depth.

flavours.name: Hubba Bubba Grape
flavours.description: The Alibarbar Ice Adjust Hubba Bubba Grape brings back childhood memories with the bold, sweet taste of classic grape bubblegum, finished with a cooling exhale. Fun, juicy, and refreshing, it’s a nostalgic favourite with an icy twist.

flavours.name: Passion Fruit Mango Lime
flavours.description: The Alibarbar Ice Adjust Passionfruit Mango Lime is a tropical trio of tangy passionfruit, sweet mango, and zesty lime, blended with a refreshing chill. Bright, fruity, and layered, it’s a perfect balance of sweet and tart.

flavours.name: Mango Magic
flavours.description: The Alibarbar Ice Adjust Mango Magic delivers the lush sweetness of tropical mango with a cool, icy edge. Smooth, juicy, and refreshing, it’s a vibrant exotic escape in every puff.

flavours.name: Grapefruit Guava Lemon
flavours.description: The Alibarbar Ice Adjust Grapefruit Guava Lemon delivers a tropical medley of tart grapefruit, exotic guava, and zesty lemon. Balanced with a refreshing chill, it’s a vibrant and tangy flavour burst with every inhale.

flavours.name: Blueberry Watermelon
flavours.description: The Alibarbar Ice Adjust Blueberry Watermelon combines the sweetness of juicy watermelon with the tang of fresh blueberries. Balanced with a cooling edge, it’s a fruity, refreshing mix perfect for all-day vaping.

flavours.name: Chupa Chups Strawberry
flavours.description: The Alibarbar Ice Adjust Chup@ Chups Strawberry recreates the nostalgic sweetness of the classic lollipop, blending candy-like strawberry with a smooth, icy finish. A playful, sweet treat for those who enjoy dessert-style vapes.

flavours.name: Blackberry
flavours.description: The Alibarbar Ice Adjust Blackberry captures the tangy sweetness of freshly picked blackberries, rounded off with a gentle icy chill. Juicy, vibrant, and slightly tart, it delivers a refreshing berry experience with every puff.

flavours.name: Blueberry Blast
flavours.description: The Alibarbar Ice Adjust Blueberry Blast packs the sweet and tangy punch of ripe blueberries, enhanced with a cooling menthol twist. Bursting with fruity flavour, it’s a crisp, refreshing vape that’s both bold and smooth.

flavours.name: Black Dragon
flavours.description: The Alibarbar Ice Adjust Black Dragon offers a bold fusion of dark berries with a smooth icy undertone. Rich, slightly tart, and refreshingly cool, it’s a mysterious blend crafted for vapers who enjoy deep, layered flavours with a crisp finish.
